g.text: The water-stress paradox: DC capital lands where water is scarcest
India's densest DC pipelines (top-right) are in over-exploited groundwater districts
Source: CGWB Ground Water Resource Assessment 2024; Cushman & Wakefield H1 2025; Newslaundry Apr 2026; Techadyant Labs.
